name: Banana Custard Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine sugar, flour, and cornstarch. Mix well and set aside.
2. Pour milk into a large saucepan and cook over medium heat until a candy thermometer registers 160°F (71°C).
3. Gradually stir one-fourth of the hot milk into yolks, stirring constantly.
4. Stir this mixture into the reserved dry ingredients, then add to the remaining hot milk.
5. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and coats the spoon. Remove from heat and stir in butter and vanilla extract.
6. Let cool to room temperature.
7. Line the bottom of a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish with one-third of the vanilla wafers.
8. Arrange half of the banana slices over the wafers; top with half of the cooled custard.
9. Repeat layers, reserving one-third of the wafers to crumble and sprinkle over the custard.
10. Chill thoroughly. Yield: 20 to 25 servings.
